Interface IUtilityNetworkSubnetwork

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to modifying a utility network subnetwork.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("80E027D0-DCFD-47D4-A95E-71B9FAADFEED")]
public interface IUtilityNetworkSubnetwork

Methods

CreateSubnetworkManager()

Create Utility Network Subnetwork Manager.

Returns

IUNSubnetworkManager
